_comment: Odoo 19 differentiation from odoo-17 base: Python 3.11+ minimum (3.12 recommended per upstream), controller @http.route(type='jsonrpc') renamed from type='json', Domain class + 'any!' operator, declarative _constraints/_indexes class attributes, first-class AI server actions. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see templates/cursor/skills/odoo/odoo-code-patterns/references/odoo-19-patterns.md for full delta list.
description: Odoo 19 Community / Enterprise — Python 3.11+, OWL, type='jsonrpc' route, Domain API, declarative _constraints. Reuses odoo-17 rule pack — see odoo-19-patterns.md for deltas.

stack._doc: Per-stack optional path overrides — used by realdata_test MCP. Leave empty to let user set <PREFIX>_ODOO_BIN / <PREFIX>_ODOO_CONF env vars at runtime.

_rules_comment: TODO: differentiate from odoo-17 base when templates/cursor/rules/odoo-19/ is authored. v19 deltas (jsonrpc route, Domain API, declarative constraints) covered in skill references only.
